caption: Day 7 of my TikTok-versary 🤍 A year on this app and somehow I’m still here(?), albeit emotionally attached to fictional men and making videos about books like it’s my full-time job…. Regardless thank you for the love, the chaos, and the comments that feel like found family, this corner of the internet is truly my Velaris. The love i recieve at times really feels like a dragon bond I absolutely did not earn and stuck around even when I disappeared into reading slumps which i cannot thank yall enough for. So from page one to now, this journey has been incredible. I love you all more than Feyre loves painting and Violet loves almost dying - Ali 💚
